title: MPIJob
description: MPIJob documents mpijob material for MPI Operator in the infrastructure domain. It is classified as an operation page for the workflow-system class, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights MPIJob, and Container Base, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include mpi, operator, mpijob, mpi-operator, and infrastructure, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is infrastructure / workflow / mpi-operator / mpijob, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation. Use it for quick orientation, implementation reminders, and deeper research.
